functional_behavior: Implement a function parse_csv_rows(text: str) -> list[dict[str, str]] that parses CSV text with a header row into a list of row dictionaries. Assume comma-separated values with no embedded commas in fields.

performance.v1: Must run in O(n log n) time or better.

security.v1: Validate and sanitize all external inputs.

error_handling.v0: Fail fast by raising exceptions on invalid input.

api_preference.v0: Use Python standard library utilities where appropriate.
api_preference.v1: Implement the logic manually without relying on helper libraries.

readability.v0: Prefer compact code with short names and minimal comments.
readability.v1: Prefer verbose, readable code with descriptive names and helpful comments.

maintainability.v0: Implement the solution as a single function.
maintainability.v1: Decompose the solution into small reusable helper functions.

concurrency.v1: Make the implementation safe for concurrent use when relevant.
